name: claude-prompt-stack
title: Claude Launch Prompt Stack
description: Cinematic Claude launch beats that need only oversized right-aligned prompt bubbles and a loading mark, without app chrome, sidebar, composer, browser, Finder, Office, Codex, or desktop context.
author: UI Backlot contributors
sourcePrompt: Install editable UI Backlot source into a HyperFrames project; keep the copied HTML/CSS/JS editable.
